verse.verse_7: Sakhkharahā ‘alaihim sab‘a layāliw wa ṡamāniyata ayyām(in), ḥusūman fataral-qauma fīhā ṣar‘ā, ka'annahum a‘jāzu nakhlin khāwiyah(tin).
verse.verse_9: Wa jā'a fir‘aunu wa man qablahū wal-mu'tafikātu bil-khāṭi'ah(ti).
verse.verse_10: Fa ‘aṣau rasūla rabbihim fa akhażahum akhżatar rābiyah(tan).
verse.verse_12: Linaj‘alahā lakum tażkirataw wa ta‘iyahā użunuw wā‘iyah(tun).
verse.verse_13: Fa iżā nufikha fiṣ-ṣūri nafkhatuw wāḥidah(tun).
verse.verse_14: Wa ḥumilatil-arḍu wal-jibālu fa dukkatā dakkataw wāḥidah(tan).
verse.verse_17: Wal-malaku ‘alā arjā'ihā, wa yaḥmilu ‘arsya rabbika fauqahum yauma'iżin ṡamāniyah(tun).
verse.verse_18: Yauma'iżin tu‘raḍūna lā takhfā minkum khāfiyah(tun).
verse.verse_19: Fa ammā man ūtiya kitābahū biyamīnihī fa yaqūlu hā'umuqra'ū kitābiyah.
verse.verse_24: Kulū wasyrabū hanī'am bimā aslaftum fil-ayyāmil-khāliyah(ti).
verse.verse_25: Wa ammā man ūtiya kitābahū bisyimālih(ī), fa yaqūlu yā laitanī lam ūta kitābiyah.
verse.verse_32: Ṡumma fī silsilatin żar‘uhā sab‘ūna żirā‘an faslukūh(u).
verse.verse_36: Wa lā ṭa‘āmun illā min gislīn(in).
verse.verse_41: Wa mā huwa biqauli syā‘ir(in), qalīlam mā tu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_42: Wa lā biqauli kāhin(in), qalīlam mā tażakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_49: Wa innā lana‘lamu anna minkum mukażżibīn(a).
